title: zornia maritima
intro: Zornia maritima, also known as sea buttonbush, is a perennial plant species native to the Americas and the Caribbean. It is a shrub-like plant with small white flowers and button-like seed pods. Zornia maritima has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been found to aid in wound healing and reduce the risk of infection. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is often used to treat skin irritations, wounds, and minor infections due to its antiseptic and antiviral properties.
